headline: Will Upgraded Q2 Outlook and Non-Residential Demand Shift Allegion's (ALLE) Growth Narrative?
summary: In the past week, attention has focused on Allegion plc ahead of its second-quarter 2026 earnings release, with Wall Street projecting earnings of US$2.21–US$2.23 per share and revenue of about US$1.11–US$1.12 billion, implying solid year-over-year growth. Analysts have recently raised their consensus earnings estimates and highlighted contributions from acquisitions and electronic security demand across non-residential end markets, underscoring increased confidence in Allegion’s near-term...

headline: Is Allegion (ALLE) Undervalued As Earnings Expectations Come Into Focus?
summary: Allegion earnings expectations come into focus Allegion (ALLE) is back on investors' radar as Wall Street tracks forecasts for its upcoming quarterly report, with attention on projected earnings per share and revenue for the security products provider. Analysts currently expect Allegion to report earnings of $2.23 per share and revenue of $1.11b in the forthcoming quarter, which recent research summaries describe as increases compared with the same period a year earlier. See our latest...

headline: Earnings To Watch: Allegion (ALLE) Reports Q2 Results Tomorrow
summary: Security hardware provider Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) will be reporting results this Thursday before market hours. Here’s what you need to know.
